description: Add reflection section to EXPERIMENT.md capturing issue #15 (code quality and tidy-up) observations, lessons learned, and final project state
steps: Step 1: Add a new section at the end of EXPERIMENT.md (before References) titled '## Reflection: Code Quality & Tidy-Up (Issue #15)'. This section should capture: (a) What the tidy-up effort found (97% Lambda coverage with 2 uncovered lines, duplicated test utilities across 5 files, CI missing boto3 and coverage reporting). (b) What was done (achieved 100% coverage, extracted shared test helpers, enhanced CI pipeline). (c) Lessons learned: even in a well-tested project, coverage gaps hide in error-handling-within-error-handling paths; shared test utilities reduce maintenance burden; CI should mirror local test commands to catch discrepancies early. (d) Final project state: 298+ tests, 100% coverage on all production code, clean test infrastructure.
Step 2: Update the test count reference in EXPERIMENT.md (and SUMMARY.md if it mentions 298 tests) to reflect the new test count after adding the DynamoDB failure path test.
acceptance_criteria: EXPERIMENT.md contains a new 'Reflection: Code Quality & Tidy-Up (Issue #15)' section
The reflection section documents: findings, actions taken, and lessons learned
Test count references are updated to the actual new count
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -q (get the final test count)
Verify the reflection section exists in EXPERIMENT.md with grep
findings: Added reflection section capturing findings, actions, and lessons learned from the code quality tidy-up. Updated test count from 298 to 299 in EXPERIMENT.md (Preliminary Observations section), SUMMARY.md (Test Suite heading and Experiment Notes), and README.md (Testing section). 'Nearly 300' references in README.md were left as-is since they remain accurate.
